title: Scan function
excerpt: Dos it possible to get a scan function next to the pictures one? At least to be available to upload official documents.

posts.author: Elo (Stephant)
posts.cookedHtml: Dos it possible to get a scan function next to the pictures one? At least to be available to upload official documents.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this a request for the mobile app to have a scan mode which optimized for documents, with page cropping and straightening, as well as contrast enhancement?

posts.author: Elo (Stephant)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes it is for the mobile app, do you think its’ doable?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m sure it could be done. But I am not part of monday (just a partner) so I have zero say. I just wanted to clarify what it is that you were requesting so that it was clear to monday what you expected.

posts.author: idodekov (Iliyan Dodekov (Deview Studios))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Elo and @anon29275264 - I’m happy to share we just released a new app - AI Image Scanner for monday.com, that achieves the scanning functionality you’re looking for. It allows you to upload or snap one or more photos through the monday.com mobile app and automatically:

  • Scan for text (OCR)
  • Summarize contents
  • Extract any information by directly typing your instructions. This way you can craft any custom use case, such as:
    Content extraction
    Classification
    Compliance
    Object detection
    Defect detection
    Explicit content detection

You can download the app from the marketplace: AI Image Scanner - monday.com App Marketplace
